privileged_info_summary: No verified privileged information available. The task.json file contains no metadata field with claims to audit. The spreadsheet data is synthetic (generated by setup_task.sh). The task creates a commission calculation scenario with Alice earning $15,000 in sales; the spreadsheet contains an intentional formula bug where the commission formula applies only a 7% tier to excess sales beyond $10,000 but omits the 5% base commission on the first $10,000. The correct commission for $15,000 sales should be $850 ($10,000 × 5% = $500 plus $5,000 × 7% = $350), but the buggy formula yields only $350. Verifier checks for: (1) documentation of audit findings in cell F1 (25 pts), (2) error localization to C2 via mention or comment (25 pts), (3) error explanation using keywords like BASE/FIRST/10000/5%/MISSING/TIER (25 pts), and (4) bonus formula correction (25 pts). Task passes at score ≥75.
